decision: F1_minimal ships as the provisional fee-diagnostic challenger over F0b (the calibrated baseline, not the naive F0a identity).
uncertainty_caveat: Only 3 distinct evaluation seasons (2019,2020,2021) exist in this scope — a season-block bootstrap would resample from just 3 units and is not reported as a headline CI. to_club_id gives 100+ clusters per season and is used instead.
